name: SuperPages
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Superpages with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
SuperPages + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on SuperPages with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is SuperPages?

SuperPages, a well-established online directory and business listing service, serves as a valuable resource for users seeking information about businesses and services in their local area. Whether you're looking for reviews, recommendations, or contact information, SuperPages offers comprehensive tools to connect you with businesses in your community.

Why SuperPages + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on SuperPages, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to SuperPages through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on SuperPages.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on SuperPages, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate SuperPages + Synup?

The SuperPages integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the SuperPages integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the SuperPages logo to manage the Synup + SuperPages integration and associated settings.

seo.title: SuperPages
seo.description: Elevate your presence on Superpages. Synup integration ensures accurate business data for superior online visibility and customer engagement.
